overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator (Euro Truck Simulator 2), showing a Mercedes Actros cabin interior driving on a snowy highway at night. The player overtakes several vehicles including a black car, DRAGADOS truck, and UPS truck while navigating through heavy snowfall and winding road sections with deteriorating visibility.

events.description: overtaking black car on the left lane
merging back into right lane after completing overtake

agents.ego_description: driving Mercedes truck on snowy highway, overtaking slower vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead in same lane before being overtaken

entered.detail: truck interior dashboard with instrument cluster, GPS navigation screen, and control panels
active windshield wipers clearing heavy snow from front glass
dark colored sedan vehicle driving ahead on the highway
metal highway guardrails covered in accumulated snow
highway direction signs suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's perspective inside a Mercedes truck cabin on a snowy highway at night. The windshield wipers actively clear falling snow as the truck approaches and overtakes a black car on the left. The dashboard instruments are illuminated, and snow-covered guardrails line both sides of the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overtaking section with commercial truck traffic

events.description: passing DRAGADOS construction truck on the right side
overtaking white semi-trailer truck on the right

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while overtaking large commercial trucks in the right lane

notable_agents.action: DRAGADOS truck with construction company branding driving in right lane
white semi-trailer truck ahead in the right lane

entered.detail: large white truck with DRAGADOS construction company logo and text
white freight semi-trailer truck with covered cargo area
tall concrete walls lining the highway to reduce noise

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the snowy highway, overtaking a DRAGADOS construction truck and a white semi-trailer on the right. Concrete noise barriers appear on the right side of the road, and the overhead signs move to the left as the vehicle progresses. Traffic consists primarily of large commercial vehicles moving at highway speeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with high snow banks

events.description: overtaking UPS delivery truck on the right side
navigating right curve with steering adjustment

agents.ego_description: steering through highway curves while overtaking a UPS delivery truck

notable_agents.action: UPS truck with brown and yellow branding being passed on the right

entered.detail: brown UPS delivery truck with distinctive yellow logo and branding
high walls of accumulated snow piled alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck navigates a curving section of highway, overtaking a UPS delivery truck on the right. High snow banks line the left side of the road, while concrete noise barriers continue on the right. The road curves gently to the right as the vehicle maintains steady progress through the snowy conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway with dense snowfall

events.description: steering through left curve with reduced visibility
visibility decreases significantly due to heavier snowfall and fog

agents.ego_description: navigating winding road through heavy snow with deteriorating visibility ahead

notable_agents.action: distant truck visible through falling snow with tail lights glowing

entered.detail: highway gantry structure with speed limit signs showing 100 and route A7
red sedan vehicle with illuminated brake lights visible through fog

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through a winding section of highway with high snow banks on both sides. Visibility begins to deteriorate as heavier snowfall sets in. The vehicle approaches a red car ahead and passes under an overhead gantry displaying speed limit signs. The road curves left and right through the mountainous terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy highway section with very low visibility

events.description: approaching red car with visible brake lights in dense fog
entering dense fog bank with severely limited visibility

agents.ego_description: slowing down to follow red car through dense fog and heavy snowfall

notable_agents.action: red car with brake lights illuminated driving ahead in foggy conditions

entered.detail: thick fog bank reducing visibility to minimum safe distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck driving through extremely dense fog and heavy snowfall. The red car ahead is followed closely with its brake lights visible through the whiteout conditions. Visibility is severely limited, and the truck maintains a safe following distance as it continues along the snow-covered highway into the dense fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway at night, transitioning from open road surroundings to a more enclosed corridor of traffic and barriers. It begins with the driver's view through a windshield where wipers actively clear falling snow while the truck overtakes a black car. As the vehicle maintains its speed, the scene shifts toward a denser flow of commercial traffic, passing a DRAGADOS construction truck and a white semi-trailer. The environment then evolves as snow-covered guardrails give way to concrete noise barriers on the right, while overhead highway signs glide past to the left. The movement concludes with the truck steadily progressing through the wintry darkness amidst a stream of large commercial vehicles.

The shot follows a continuous drive along a snowy highway that transitions from a clear curving road into a blinding whiteout. It begins by navigating a gentle right-hand curve, overtaking a UPS delivery truck while passing high snow banks and concrete noise barriers. As the road winds through mountainous terrain, the camera passes under an overhead speed limit gantry and approaches a red car while the snowfall begins to intensify. The scene then shifts into a state of severely limited visibility as the snowfall evolves into dense fog. Finally, the truck continues forward into the whiteout, following the glowing brake lights of the red car through the thick, obscuring mist.
